full_text:
Yang Hong (Jixiu) 楊洪 (季休)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yang Hong (楊洪), styledJixiu (季休), was born in Jianwei. Argued with Li Yan, urged Zhuge Liang to follow orders and raise all forces for Hanzhong. Yang Hong was affiliated with Liu Zhang and the Shu Kingdom. Yang Hong lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
